zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel ap Cynwrig於大約1224年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾盧阿邦時，他的父親Cynwrig ap Gronwy56歲，母親Mrs. Cynwrig ap Gronwy24歲。他於1252年與Joan Maelog在威爾士布雷康史爾布雷孔結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hywel ap Cynwrig于大约1224年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾盧阿邦时，他的父亲Cynwrig ap Gronwy56岁，母亲Mrs. Cynwrig ap Gronwy24岁。他于1252年与Joan Maelog在威尔士布雷康史爾布雷孔结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel ap Cynwrig was born about 1224, in Ruabon, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Cynwrig ap Gronwy, was 56 and his mother, Mrs. Cynwrig ap Gronwy, was 24. He married Joan Maelog in 1252, in Brecon, Breconshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel ap Cynwrig est né environ 1224, à Ruabon, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Cynwrig ap Gronwy, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Cynwrig ap Gronwy, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Maelog en 1252, à Brecon, Breconshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel ap Cynwrig um 1224 in Ruabon, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cynwrig ap Gronwy 56 und seine Mutter Mrs. Cynwrig ap Gronwy 24. Er hat 1252 in Brecon, Breconshire, Wales Joan Maelog geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ap Cynwrig è nato il circa 1224 nel Ruabon, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Cynwrig ap Gronwy, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Cynwrig ap Gronwy, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan Maelog nel 1252, nel Brecon, Breconshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Cynwrigが約1224年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルアボンで生まれた時，父Cynwrig ap Gronwyは56歳，母Mrs. Cynwrig ap Gronwyは24歳であった。1252年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアブレコンでJoan Maelogと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Cynwrig(이)가 대략 1224년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루압에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cynwrig ap Gronwy(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Cynwrig ap Gronwy(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1252년 웨일스 브레콘실르 브레콘에서 Joan Maelog(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ap Cynwrig nasceu aproximadamente 1224, em Ruabon, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Cynwrig ap Gronwy, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Cynwrig ap Gronwy, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Maelog em 1252, em Brecon, Breconshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel ap Cynwrig родился около 1224 г. в местности руабон, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Cynwrig ap Gronwy было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Cynwrig ap Gronwy, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Maelog в 1252 г. в местности брекон, брекуншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel ap Cynwrig nació aproximadamente 1224, en Ruabon, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Cynwrig ap Gronwy, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Mrs. Cynwrig ap Gronwy, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan Maelog en 1252, en Brecon, Breconshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos.
